name: refrakt-md
description: A content framework built on Markdoc

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/types -w packages/transform -w packages/behaviors && npm run build -w packages/runes && npm run build -w plugins/marketing -w plugins/docs -w plugins/storytelling -w plugins/places -w plugins/business -w plugins/design -w plugins/learning -w plugins/media && npm run build -w packages/lumina -w packages/highlight -w packages/sveltekit -w packages/html -w packages/astro -w packages/nuxt -w packages/next -w packages/react -w packages/vue && npm run build -w packages/content -w packages/ai && npm run build -w packages/eleventy -w plugins/plan && npm run build -w packages/create-refrakt -w packages/editor && npm run build -w packages/cli && npm run build -w packages/mcp
scripts.version-packages: changeset version && node scripts/sync-plugin-versions.mjs && node scripts/generate-changelog.mjs && npm install --package-lock-only
